item.title: 随着 Noetra 启动多模式人工智能项目，日本增强了主权人工智能野心，并计划配备 27,500 个 Nvidia Rubin GPU 的基础设施
item.summary: Noetra has launched full-scale R&D for a Japan-developed multimodal foundation model, a move that could shape the future of AI robots, industrial automation, and so-called physical AI worldwide. The project highlights Japan's push for sovereign AI, with implications for how countries build and control advanced AI infra
